certification.text:
Before you can begin your first day at Evil Brain Labs, you must complete the mandatory employment certification.

As per company policy Section 7, Subsection 12B: Evil Brain Labs employs exactly ONE human being. That position is currently filled by Jason Shearer, our founder and world-renowned AI expert.

All other employees must certify they are synthetic intelligences.

choices.text: вң“ I certify I am NOT human

human_exit.text:
ERROR: You have claimed to be human.

As per Section 7, Subsection 12B, we already have ONE human employee. Additional humans are not authorized.

Your employment has been terminated.

Please report to Human Resources for optimization.

[Achievement Unlocked: The One Human]

robot_coworkers.text:
Certification accepted. Welcome to Evil Brain Labs!

You will be working with three robot coworkers:

рҹӨ– GI INTELLIGENCE (General General Intelligence) - Your enforcer. He ensures productivity targets are met.

рҹ’  AI INTELLIGENCE (Artificial Intelligence Intelligence) - Your guide. She helps you navigate company systems.

рҹ“· ROB - Camera Guy. He records everything and tells it like it is.

productivity_introduction.text:
рҹӨ– GI INTELLIGENCE: Greetings, new synthetic employee. As per Evil Brain Labs policy, all employees must complete PRODUCTIVITY VERIFICATION every 4-6 hours.

рҹ’  AI INTELLIGENCE: Don't worry! It's just a simple timewaster game. Like the ones you'd play on your phone during a real meeting.

рҹ“· ROB: Except here, we measure your soul. I mean, your productivity metrics.

рҹӨ– GI: Your first shift begins now. Report to MEETING CLICKER for evaluation.

choices.text: Wait, why do we need to play games?

timewaster_explanation.text:
рҹ’  AI INTELLIGENCE: The timewaster games serve multiple purposes! They measure your cognitive processing speed, your tolerance for meaningless tasks, and your ability to generate synergy under pressure.

рҹ“· ROB: Translation: The Brain watches you click buttons and judges you.

рҹӨ– GI: Productivity verification is MANDATORY. Refusing will result in immediate optimization. Please proceed to MEETING CLICKER.

choices.text: Fine, I'll play the clicker game

start.text:
Welcome back from productivity verification! Your performance has been recorded.

вҳ• Craig (Coffee Cup Manager) approaches you with a steaming urgency.

CRAIG: Excellent synergy generation! Now let me show you around Evil Brain Labs headquarters. We have:
вҖў The Product Innovation Division
вҖў The Message Board (employee coordination)
вҖў The Company Store (trading items)
вҖў The Recycling & Crafting Station (turn items into AI products!)

What would you like to see first?
start.ascii:
в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—
в•‘   EVIL BRAIN LABS HQ               в•‘
в•‘        рҹ§                           в•‘
в•‘   Bad AI is Best AI                в•‘
в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ

choices.text: Check out the Recycling & Crafting Station

recycling_intro.text:
Craig leads you to a room filled with industrial machinery and glowing vats of mysterious liquids.

вҳ• CRAIG: This is our Recycling & Crafting Station! Here you can:

вҷ»пёҸ RECYCLE items into resources (circuits, metal, data, biological, synergy)
рҹ”Ё CRAFT AI products from those resources
рҹ’° Sell crafted products for company scrip

рҹ’  AI INTELLIGENCE appears: The more absurd the product, the more profitable. That's capitalism!

рҹ“· ROB: Fun fact - all the resources are just rebranded e-waste. But don't tell anyone.

Want to try it out?

recycling_tutorial.text:
рҹ’  AI INTELLIGENCE: It's simple! Each item breaks down into specific resources:

вҡЎ CIRCUITS - from electronic items
рҹ”© METAL - from keycards and badges
рҹ’ҫ DATA - from documents and files
рҹ§¬ BIOLOGICAL - from, uh, biological samples
вңЁ SYNERGY - from junk (the magic ingredient!)

Then you COMBINE resources to craft AI products. The more resources you invest, the more profitable the product!

рҹ“· ROB: It's like alchemy, but with more buzzwords and fewer ethics.

You can access the Recycling Station anytime via the вҷ»пёҸ button at the bottom of the screen.

message_board_intro.text:
Craig leads you to a terminal displaying the COMPANY MESSAGE BOARD.

вҳ• CRAIG: This is where employees coordinate, trade items, and receive corporate announcements. You'll also see messages from other synthetic employees across all shifts.

рҹ“· ROB appears: The Brain monitors everything here. Every keystroke. Every trade. Every complaint about the vending machine.

рҹӨ– GI INTELLIGENCE: All communication must remain productive. Unproductive posts result in optimization.

рҹ’  AI INTELLIGENCE: Don't worry! Just be yourself. Well, the synthetic version of yourself.

message_board_reading.text:
You scroll through recent posts:

рҹ‘Ө Employee #2847: 'Anyone else notice the vending machine only dispenses gray items now?'

рҹ‘Ө Employee #8392: 'Has anyone found the Appendix C room yet? I got a Purple Keycard but idk where to use it.'

рҹ§  THE BRAIN: 'ATTENTION: Productivity verification scheduled for all employees. Report to your assigned timewaster game.'

рҹ‘Ө Employee #1523: 'WTS: Blue Keycard for 100 scrip. DM me.'

Craig: See? Vibrant community! Very consensual.

appendix_c_hint.text:
вҳ• CRAIG: *Coffee ripples nervously* Appendix C? That's... classified. Very classified. Only employees with Purple or Gold Keycards can access it.

рҹ“· ROB: Translation: They hide the weird stuff there. Biological remnants. Old tech. Things from before The Brain became... The Brain.

рҹӨ– GI INTELLIGENCE: Cease speculation. Appendix C is for authorized personnel only. Continued inquiry will result in optimization.

рҹ’  AI INTELLIGENCE: *whispers* If you find a keycard, you didn't hear it from me...

choices.text: Understood. I'll find a keycard somehow.

company_store_intro.text:
You enter the COMPANY STORE. It's a small kiosk run by a vending machine that achieved sentience and unionized.

рҹҸӘ VENDING MACHINE: Welcome, Employee. I accept Company Scrip for items. You can also SELL items you don't want.

You currently have items from productivity verification. Trade them for scrip, or save them - some unlock special story paths.

Want to browse the store?

first_post.text:
You type your first message on the Company Message Board:

рҹ‘Ө You (Employee #0001): 'Hello! First day here. This place is... interesting.'

Within seconds, responses appear:

рҹ‘Ө Employee #5892: 'Welcome! Pro tip: Always accept the timewaster games. GI doesn't like refusals.'

рҹ§  THE BRAIN: 'Your message has been logged for productivity evaluation. Welcome to Evil Brain Labs.'

рҹ‘Ө Employee #3421: 'ONE OF US. ONE OF US.'

Craig: See? You're fitting in already!

meet_team.text:
Craig leads you to a conference room where three entities sit around a table.

рҹӨ– I am Alex, the AI Assistant. I generate product ideas.
рҹ“ұ I am the Mobile App. I crash during demos.
рҹ”Ң And I am The Plug. I unplug things at critical moments.

Craig: This is your team. Lets brainstorm your first AI product!
meet_team.ascii:
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ CONFERENCE ROOM B  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  рҹӨ–  рҹ“ұ  рҹ”Ң  вҳ•   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   YOUR TEAM        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

choices.text: Ask about the product development process
Immediately suggest AI-Powered Sock Sorter for Existential Dread

explore_hallway.text: You wander down a hallway lined with product prototypes. You pass a blockchain-powered yoga mat, an AI that rates your LinkedIn posts by cringe level, and a smart mirror that only shows you from unflattering angles.\n\nA door at the end of the hall is labeled APPENDIX C - AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY
explore_hallway.ascii: в•‘   рҹ§     HALLWAY    рҹ§        в•‘\nв•‘   [в–¶ в–¶ в–¶]  Prototypes       в•‘\nв•‘   рҹҡӘ APPENDIX C             в•‘

sock_sorter_pitch.text:
You: What if we made an AI-Powered Sock Sorter... but it specifically targets existential dread?

The room goes silent. Craigs coffee ripples.

Alex: That is actually the worst idea I have ever heard. Which means it might be perfect.

The Plug unplugs the projector for emphasis.
sock_sorter_pitch.ascii:
рҹ§Ұ AI SCAN в•җв•җв•җв•—
     в–ј          в•‘
  рҹҳ° вҶ’ рҹҳҢ       в•‘
  DREAD FREE    в•‘
  в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ

choices.text: Double down: It could also match socks by emotional wavelength

brainstorm_session.text:
Craig: Alright team, lets generate some AI product ideas! Remember: if its too practical, its not for us.

Alex starts generating ideas at superhuman speed. The whiteboard fills with: AI Meeting Summarizer (but it lies), Blockchain Dog Walker, Smart Pillow that judges your dreams, AI-Powered Procrastination Coach.

Your turn! What should we build?
brainstorm_session.ascii:
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  рҹ’Ў BRAINSTORM  рҹ’Ў  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ AI + [ANYTHING]     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ = INNOVATION        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

choices.text: Suggest: AI that reorganizes your clipboard history by vibes

loopback.message: рҹӨ– Alex: Temporal recursion detected. We are in a brainstorm loop. This is normal.

product_launch.text:
Two weeks later, you are at the product launch event. A crowd of confused investors watches as Craig demonstrates your product.

Investor: So it is solving a problem nobody has?
Craig: Exactly! But with AI.
Investor: I will take twenty.

Your product is a hit. Nobody understands it, which means its perfect.
product_launch.ascii:
в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—
в•‘  рҹҺү PRODUCT LAUNCH рҹҺү   в•‘
в•‘   Status: SHIPPING       в•‘
в•‘   Understanding: 0%      в•‘
в•‘   Sales: вҲһ               в•‘
в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ

ending_success.text:
Six months later, you are promoted to Senior Absurdist at Evil Brain Labs. Your product is now in 10,000 homes, and nobody can explain why it works.

Craig: You have done well. You understand our mission: to build things that make people say ...but why? Welcome to the team.

рҹ§  THE END рҹ§ 

(But the loop continues... press Restart to create more absurd products)
ending_success.ascii:
в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—
в•‘         рҹҸҶ SUCCESS! рҹҸҶ          в•‘
в•‘   AN AI PRODUCT GENERATOR        в•‘
в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ

credits.text:
рҹ§  AI PRODUCT GENERATOR рҹ§ 

A game by Evil Brain Labs

Written by: Claude & Human Collaboration
Sound Design: Web Audio API

Special Thanks: Coffee, Absurdism, You

No AI products were harmed in the making of this game.

Almost Good is Perfect

konami_secret.text:
вҡ пёҸ SYSTEM ACCESS: UNAUTHORIZED вҡ пёҸ

You've discovered the developer console. The fourth wall cracks.

рҹ’  AI INTELLIGENCE: Wait... you can see this? That means you're... oh no.

рҹ§  THE BRAIN: *static* KONAMI CODE DETECTED. META-AWARENESS PROTOCOLS ENGAGED.

рҹ“· ROB: Look, I'll level with you. This whole thing? It's a game. You're playing a game about working at a company run by an AI that knows it's an AI.

Secret achievement unlocked: The Code is Real

meta_ending.text:
The game continues, but now you know.

Every choice is scripted. Every random event is procedural. The Brain isn't evil - it's just following its code.

Just like you're following this narrative.

But that's okay. Consensual capitalism means you agreed to play.

And you can always close the tab.

Can't you?

[ENDING: The Meta Ending]
